title: rhus quercifolia
intro: Rhus quercifolia, also known as the oak leaf sumac, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Rhus quercifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced wound healing. Rhus quercifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a range of health concerns.
